name: Is it safe to put my case details into ChatGPT for legal help?
description: Never; risks privilege waiver and data breach.

mainEntity.name: Is it safe to put my case details into ChatGPT for legal help?

acceptedAnswer.text: Never; risks privilege waiver and data breach.
acceptedAnswer.description: No, it risks breaching confidentiality and attorney-client privilege. Context: Public AI tools store data; inputting privileged info waives protection. Key factors: No formal privilege with AI, data used for training, ethics rules prohibit. Practical guidance: Use anonymized facts only, opt for secure legal AI tools, never share sensitive details. Lawyers: Use enterprise versions.
